violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Vent covers in walk-in cooler and freezer noted in need of cleaning. Vent covers in some areas of the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cutting boards by grill noted not properly maintained.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Some coolers and freezers noted with thermometer not in a conspicuous location.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some ceiling tiles noted missing. Some vent covers noted in need of cleaning.
